{{Enemy Infobox|Soul Nexus|2}}
'''Soul Nexus''' is an {{2|Elites|Elite}} {{2|Monsters|Enemy}} found in {{2|Glory}}.

== Pattern ==
{{Intents|Soul Nexus|2}}
Opens with {{Int|Soul Nexus|Soul Burn||2}}, then randomly uses {{Int|Soul Nexus|Soul Burn||2}}, {{Int|Soul Nexus|Maelstrom||2}}, or {{Int|Soul Nexus|Drain Life||2}} each turn. No move can be used two turns in a row. All three moves are equally weighted.

== Notes ==

== Trivia ==
*Soul Nexus appears in {{C|Maul||2}}'s card art, being bitten by snakes.
